docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONSON, ROBERT CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT B/Y BROADCASTING, INC., DBA TRAFFIC CENTRAL
